# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Cyberpunk City Map Upgrades & AI Assistant Enhancements
- Summary: Showcase the latest CodeGrind updates: cyberpunk city map improvements, AI assistant upgrades, and streamlined workflow features that boost problem-solving and navigation.

- Content kind: image

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-cyberpunk-old-city-updates

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind continues to evolve with a cyberpunk city map refresh, improved AI-assisted problem solving via Azure OpenAI, and a clearer engagement workflow. Expect smoother navigation, richer visuals, and smarter in-editor guidance that helps users learn DS&A more effectively.
- CTA: Explore the updated CodeGrind experience and try AI-assisted problem solving today.
- Visual brief: Static hero-style image: a neon-lit city map UI overlaid with highlighted problem nodes, AI assistant chat panel on the side, subtle cyberspace glow, CodeGrind branding.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
